problem.name: Traffic Congestion
problem.description: Peak-hour gridlock on OMR, GST Road, and inner-city flyovers costs commuters hours daily and bleeds productivity from Maruthapuram's office corridors.

solution.approach: AI signal timing using live camera and GPS feeds across 200 junctions
solution.revenue: Annual SaaS license per junction zone to the city corporation
solution.edge: Ward-level Tamil alerts for auto unions and offline failover at junction boxes

npcs.name: Meenakshi Devi
npcs.personality: Charismatic and politically savvy; backs projects that look good on progress reports.

npcs.name: Anirudh Prakash
npcs.personality: Analytical and direct; asks for unit economics before he asks for vision.

npcs.name: Revathi Priya
npcs.personality: Inquisitive and skeptical; interviews even in casual chat and quotes you back.

npcs.name: Senthil Velan
npcs.personality: Policy-focused bureaucrat; cites circulars first, softens only on commuter safety.
